question: For the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' during the 1991 census year, list each district and its calculated household density—defined as the total number of households divided by the total number of occupied residential houses—ensuring the total occupied residential houses is greater than zero, and show the top 10 districts with the highest density.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) / SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) AS household_density FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES) > 0 ORDER BY household_density DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dim.district,
    SUM(fact.number_of_households) / SUM(fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) AS household_density
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dim
JOIN fact_housing fact ON dim.hierarchy_id = fact.hierarchy_id
WHERE dim.state = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fact.census_year = 1991
    AND fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 0
GROUP BY dim.district
HAVING SUM(fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) > 0
ORDER BY household_density DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dim.district,
    SUM(fact.number_of_households) / SUM(fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) AS household_density
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dim
JOIN fact_housing fact ON dim.hierarchy_id = fact.hierarchy_id
WHERE dim.state = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fact.census_year = 1991
    AND fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses > 0
GROUP BY dim.district
HAVING SUM(fact.number_of_occupied_residential_houses) > 0
ORDER BY household_density DESC
LIMIT 10;
